title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS argues that junior cloud engineers should shift focus from coding alone to understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance while using AI agents as tools. The video advocates that knowing what to build and why is now more critical than raw coding ability.
